game.wordle.controls_action: [Tab] Switch to Input Mode [Space] Save [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.wordle.controls_input: [Tab] Switch to Action Mode [A-Z] Enter Letters [Backspace]/[Delete] Delete Last Letter [Enter] Submit Guess
game.wordle.description: Guess the hidden word based on the color hints after each attempt.
game.wordle.details:
f%Guess the hidden word within six attempts. Each guess returns color hints.

{tc:yellow}Hints:{tc:clear}
{tc:black|bg:green}X{tc:clear|bg:clear} Correct letter, correct position
{tc:black|bg:yellow}X{tc:clear|bg:clear} Correct letter, wrong position
{tc:#555753}X{tc:clear} Letter not present or already exhausted

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[A]-[Z]{tc:clear} Enter letters
{tc:light_cyan}[Backspace]/[Delete]{tc:clear} Delete last letter
{tc:light_cyan}[Enter]{tc:clear} Submit guess
{tc:light_cyan}[Tab]{tc:clear} Switch between input mode and action mode
{tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Save
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.wordle.lose: You did not guess the correct word.
game.wordle.name: Wordle
